title: Pentagon releases new batch of UFO files
description: The files include over 40 videos requested by lawmakers. NewsNation will be reviewing the files and providing analysis.

title: US releases second batch of declassified UFO files
description: The US Defense Department has released a second batch of previously ‌classified files on alleged UFO sightings, including references to ‌people reporting unexplained green orbs, discs and fireballs.

title: Pentagon Unveils New UAP Footage and Documents from 2023 Incident
description: The Pentagon has unveiled new footage and documents related to unidentified anomalous phenomena (UAP), including a significant incident from February 2023 over Lake Huron. This release features an infrared video showing a US fighter jet engaging an airborne object, believed to be a weather balloon. The declassified files, which include over 60 documents, highlight ongoing investigations into various unexplained aerial occurrences. Officials have clarified that the release does not provide conclusions about the nature or origin of the objects involved. This incident occurred during a period of heightened scrutiny over airborne objects in North America, including a Chinese spy balloon. Read on to learn more about the details and implications of this release.
